level_signals: Comp range $151,200–$189,000 base, consistent with mid-to-senior IC at Scale AI
Owns program-level planning and systems workstreams independently
Expected to develop deep account context and drive lasting operational improvements

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Own day-to-day monitoring and execution of Production Plan and Opportunity Forecast; act quickly on demand changes.
Create/validate staffing requests and communicate staffing changes to Delivery teams, STOs and EMs.
Monitor account-level FTE budgets and employee spend; contribute to cost/benefit analysis of staffing vs. revenue.
Ensure all revenue-generating opportunities are correctly logged in Opportunity Ingest (Linear) and that scoping is consistent.
Run weekly checks to confirm Opportunity Forecast accuracy, and coordinate tactical scoping fixes when needed.
Design, build and maintain scalable planning tools and account-level reporting artifacts (ramp planning sheets, account dashboards, account playbooks).
Drive systems enablement, process documentation (SOPs), and handoffs that reduce manual work and increase reliability.
Actively participate in core account meetings (ops, finance, GTM, delivery) as the Ops demand operational lead.
This role combines program management, operational rigor, analytics literacy, and strong stakeholder management
Partner with Supply Ops to review the Production Plan weekly (PP, TCD, historical productive hours) and drive forecasting accuracy and adjustments.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: This is a role designed to build deep account knowledge: each Planning TPM will ultimately be assigned to support 1–2 priority accounts to develop the context and relationships required to drive lasting operational improvements and more accurate planning and forecasting.
expedite translation of demand signals into the forecast (Airtable / PP / OF)

scope.surface: Operations Planning — cross-functional program management spanning demand forecasting, staffing, opportunity ingest, and account-level reporting for 1–2 priority accounts
scope.business_model: B2B AI data and services platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Forecasting accuracy (Production Plan and Opportunity Forecast)
core_responsibilities: Ensure project-level customer demand is captured accurately, consistently and at the right level of granularity
Own day-to-day monitoring and execution of Production Plan and Opportunity Forecast
Create/validate staffing requests and communicate staffing changes to Delivery teams, STOs and EMs
Monitor account-level FTE budgets and employee spend
Ensure all revenue-generating opportunities are correctly logged in Opportunity Ingest (Linear)
Design, build and maintain scalable planning tools and account-level reporting artifacts
Standardize and centralize information flow across customer ops pillars
Drive systems enablement, process documentation (SOPs), and handoffs

compensation.equity_form: equity grant subject to Board of Director approval

90-day waiting period policy before reconsidering candidates for the same role
Location limited to San Francisco or New York — no remote option indicated, limiting candidate pool
Role heavily involves manual operational coordination (weekly checks, discrepancy correction) which may signal under-automated systems
